questions.enonce: How is the passive voice formed?
In passive voice, the object of the active sentence becomes the subject.
Change to passive: 'The scientist found a cure.'
options: A cure is finding by the scientist
A cure was found by the scientist
The scientist was found by a cure

questions.enonce: Many inventions {{1}} made in the 19th century. (were/was)
Passive voice is often used in scientific reports.
